messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration project.

The migration is currently 80% complete and everything is progressing smoothly. We're on track to deliver by Friday as planned.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need additional details.

Best regards

content.delta: Done! I've sent the email to **alice@example.com** with the subject "Project Update". The message confirms that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery. Let me know if you need anything else! 📧
